sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2963" key="a)kataggei/wtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκατ-αγγείωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n2963.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">notsupplied with blood vessels</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δέρμα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> </cit>(?) ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:17:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.17.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
